title: [release-1.28] copier.Put(): clear up os/syscall mode bit confusion  and bump to `v1.28.1`
body: Backport https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4411 for podman `v4.3.2` as discussed here: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/4427
